title: Echoes of the Beneath
description: Cave horror and more you will see...
body:
## 🌑 Echoes Beneath – A Cave Survival Experience
🕳️ Descend Into Darkness

Forget the surface. In Echoes Beneath, survival is forged in the twisting caverns, glowing depths, and uncharted darkness below. Light is rare, shadows move, and the caves are alive with both wonder and terror.

This isn’t just mining — this is survival, reborn underground.

## ⚔️ What Awaits You

Deeper & Darker → step into a terrifying new dimension where the Warden is only the beginning.

End of Herobrine → encounter chilling lore and strange presences in the shadows.

Alex’s Mobs → wildlife adapts, even beneath the earth.

Smarter Mobs (SmartBrainLib) → enemies don’t just chase, they hunt.

Shaders + Animations → Complementary Unbound & Fresh Animations make caves pulse with light and atmosphere.

Optimized Performance → ModernFix keeps gameplay smooth no matter how deep you go.

And tons more!

## 🌌 The Experience

Every cave feels alive.
Every echo might be danger.
Every descent takes you closer to something you may never return from.

The overworld is optional — your true survival begins underground.

## 💀 Can You Survive the Depths?
Grab your torches, listen to the echoes, and remember: down here, the dark is watching.

## [Like my creations](https://modrinth.com/project/echoes-of-the-beneath)
